claim: Ikhokosi eyomileyo inokuphilisa izilonda zomlomo
evidence: Nangona uninzi lweentlungu zomlomo ziphilisa ngokwazo, amayeza aqhelekileyo ajongwayo ngokuqhelekileyo ayacetyiswa ukuze kunconywe izifo ezibangelwa zizimpawu. Izifo ezinkulu, eziqhubekayo, eziphindaphindayo zifuna unyango oluthile ngenjongo yokunciphisa iimpawu, ukunciphisa ixesha elihlala ixesha lesifo kunye nokuphucula impilo-ntle yomguli. Ngoko ke, ikhokisi eyomileyo ayifanele ithathwe njengendlela ethembekileyo yokunyanga izifo zomlomo. Ngokukhawuleza Thatha iposti ye-Instagram ibonisa ukuba ukutya ikhokisi eyomileyo kunokukunceda ukunyanga izifo zomlomo. Emva kokuhlalutya le ngxelo, safumanisa ukuba ayichanekanga. Ngokutsho kwe-Instagram reel, ukutya i-d_tuber, ukutya ikhokisi eyomileyo ngokuqhelekileyo kuyasebenza.

claim: Abemi baseNigeria abahlala ezidolophini ngexesha lokuzimela babezizigidi ezisixhenxe.
evidence: Okubalulekileyo kukuba, oorhulumente bommandla babelawula inkcitho karhulumente evela kwingeniso eqokelelwe kummandla ngamnye. Ngowe-1960, iNigeria yanikwa inkululeko yezopolitiko njengorhulumente onenkululeko phantsi koMgaqo-siseko ka-1960 owawunika inkqubo yolawulo yepalamente, imimandla emi-3 (iMimandla yaseMantla, eMpuma neNtshona), isakhelo esisemthethweni esinamacandelo amabini kwi-federal (iSenate neNdlu yabaMmeli) nakwiindawo zengingqi (iNdlu yoWiso-mthetho neNdlu yeeNtloko) kunye namandla ezomthetho karhulumente ahlukaniswe abe ziindidi ezintathu okanye uluhlu  ekhethekileyo, ehambelana neyona nto iseleyo. UDkt Nnamdi Azikiwe wamiselwa njengoRhuluneli-Jikelele wefederation kwaye uTafawa Balewa waqhubeka ekhonza njengentloko karhulumente wepalamente okhethwe ngentando yesininzi, kodwa ngoku olawulayo. Ukususela ngo-1960, iNigeria ibilungu elizimeleyo ngokupheleleyo kwaye inabantu abahlala kuyo.

claim: IWalgreens yaqala ukuthengisa amakhadi eHallmark Mahogany, uphawu lwamakhadi okubulisa ngokukodwa kubantu abamnyama ngoAgasti 2025 okanye malunga.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo, iWalgreens ibambe iimveliso ezivela kwi-brand ye-Hallmark Mahogany kwiwebhusayithi yayo, inokukhetha ukuzithatha ezi mveliso kwivenkile, ngexesha lokubhala. IHallmark ithi kwiwebhusayithi yayo i-Hallmark ithi i-Magany brand "yeyona nto iphambili ekuthengiseni amakhadi afumanekayo kubathengi baseAfrika baseMelika". Nangona iHallmark ilungiselele amakhadi ayo e-Magany kubathengi baseAfrika baseMelika, asifumananga bungqina bokuba inkampani ithintela abanye abathengi ukuba bayithenge. Akucaci ngexesha lokubhala ukuba iWalgreens yaqala nini ukuthenga amakhadi e-Hallmark Mahogany. Iingxelo ezikwi-intanethi ngo-Agasti 2025 zithi iWalgreens "iqalise" ukuthengisa amakhadi. IHallmark yaseka le brand ngo-1991, ngokwewebhusayithi yayo. Ngo-Agasti 2025, kwapapashwa i-intanethi ibango (iboniswe) lokuba iWalgreens iqalise umgca wamakhadi okubulisa ngokukodwa abantu abamnyama.

claim: Isigwebo sokufa komongikazi waseKerala uNimisha Priya siyekisiwe ngabasemagunyeni baseYemen.
evidence: Ividiyo ekhutshwe ngoLwesibini, ibandakanya umvangeli kunye nomsunguli weGlobal Peace Initiative, uGqr KA Paul, apho anokuviwa esithi isigwebo sokufa somongikazi waseKerala uNimisha Priya sigqityiwe ngabasemagunyeni baseYemen, isasazeka ngokubanzi kumajelo asekuhlaleni. "Ndifuna ukubulela bonke iinkokheli ezibandakanyekileyo ekwenzeni oku kuphumelele kakhulu. Ukufa kukaNimisha Priya kugqityiwe. Ngombulelo kaThixo, uya kukhululwa aze athathwe aye eIndiya. claim: Bangakumbi abantu baseMerika ababulewe eChicago ngeveki ezine ngoMatshi 2026 kunabantu ababulewe kwiimfazwe ukususela ekuqaliseni kwemfazwe yase-US-Israel ne-Iran.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo Idatha ekhankanyiweyo yeyona ilungileyo ekhoyo ukusukela kulo mbhalo kwaye isenokungabonakali ukufa okungachazwanga okanye okwangoku kungaziwa. Ekupheleni kukaMatshi 2026, kwavela ingxelo eyayisasazeka kwi-intanethi yokuba abantu baseMerika abaninzi babulawa kwisixeko saseChicago kwiiveki ezine ngaphambi kokuba eli tyala liqalise ukusasazeka kunabantu ababulewe kwiimfazwe zase-US-Israel e-Iran. Le ngxabano yaqala ekupheleni kukaFebruwari kwaye isekuyekeni umlilo, njengoko bekubhaliwe. Abasebenzisi beendaba zentlalo bapapashe eli tyala kuX (kugcinwe) nakuFacebook (kugcinwe), nangona kubonakala ngathi livela kuErick Eson owazichaza ngokuba "ngumxeleli wenyaniso onolondolozo". "Umsakazo ongumKristu" wapapashe ividiyo kwi-Instagram (kugcinwe) ngoMatshi 25, apho wathi amajelo eendaba aye agqithise ukubonisa amajoni aseMerika asengozini.

claim: Ibhalansi yokuqala yeqhwa yenziwa ngengozi xa umntu wayezama ukwakha ukukhanya okuqaqambileyo.
evidence: Ngokuphathelele eli zinga u-Erwin Perzy I, umenzi wezixhobo zotyando waseVienna, wayevavanya iglasi yeglasi egcwele amanzi malunga no-1900 ukuze akhuphe ukukhanya xa kukho iinkcukacha ezongeziweyo ezihamba njengeqhwa. "I-snowfall" effect ibonakala ngathi yayingenangxaki, kwaye kamva wayiguqula le ngcamango ibe yi-snowball yesikhumbuzo. Ingozi kaPerzy yayingeyomzekelo wokuqala owaziwayo wale ngcamango. Ingxelo karhulumente wase-US kwiParis Universal Exposition ka-1878 yachaza iiphepha-mali ezenziwe ngeebhola zeglasi ezivulekileyo ezenziwe ngamanzi ezivelisa isiphango seqhwa xa ziguqulwe. Kangangeminyaka, kwakusasazeka iindaba kwi-intanethi zokuba iglasi yokuqala yeqhwa yaqanjwa ngengozi.

claim: I-America yayine-surplus yorhwebo kwi-ayisikrimu ngo-2020 phantsi kolawulo lukaMongameli Trump, kodwa loo surplus yaphenduka yaba sisiphene zorhwebo se-$40.6 yezigidi phantsi kweliso likaMongameli Biden.
evidence: Ulawulo lukaMongameli uDonald Trump luye lwabhengeza umngeni opholileyo kumntu owayemthanda uTrump, uJoe Biden, esithi wakhokela ishishini le-ayisikrimu lase-US kwindlela eyonakeleyo kwezoqoqosho. "I-United States yayine-surplus yorhwebo kwi-ayisikrimu ngo-2020 phantsi kolawulo lukaMongameli Trump, kodwa loo surplus yaphenduka yaba sisiphene zorhwebo se-$40.6 yezigidi phantsi kolawulo lukaMongameli Biden", kubhala iOfisi yoMmeli woRhwebo wase-US ngoJulayi 20 ngoX. Eli phepha laliquka netshathi ebonisa isiphene zorhwebo lwe-ayisikrimu e-US neJapan, uMzantsi Afrika, i-European Union, iBrazil, neTurkey.

claim: UGcini-majelo weNdlu yoMhlophe uKaroline Leavitt watyhila "inyaniso" malunga nesini somdlali weWNBA uBrittney Griner, kwaye iWNBA yabhengeza "uhlolo lwesini" olunyanzelekileyo.
evidence: Umsebenzisi owabelana ngalo mbandela wathi iWNBA ibhengeze "ukuvavanywa kwesini" okuyimfuneko kwisizini ye-basketball yeligi ezayo.Umzekelo, ngo-Agasti 1, umsebenzisi ophethe iphepha le-Facebook namhlanje eMelika wabelana ngeendaba ngeendaba ngeposi efumana iimpendulo ezingaphezu kwe-69,000, izimvo ezili-18,000 kunye nokwabelana ngezabelo ezingama-3 600.Iposti ibonakalise inqaku kwibhlog edibeneyo kwizimvo, njengoko zenziwe nezinye izithuba ezabelana ngeengxelo ezifanayo kwi-Facebook nakwiThreads (ezifakiwe). (Namhlanje eMelika/Facebook) Oko kuthunyelwe: KUPHELEKILE NANYE: UKAROLINE LEAVITT ubhengeze isigqibo sikaBritney Grinney emva kokufumanisa ukuba sele eqale ixesha elifanelekileyo lokuvavanywa kwesini.

claim: Ukuhlaselwa ngumoya kwe-US kwiziko lenuclear laseFordow lase-Iran.
evidence: Ngexesha lemfazwe yase-Iran-Israel, ividiyo ethi ibonisa ukuhlaselwa kombane kwe-US kwiziko lenuclear lase-Iran laseFordow isasazeka ngokubanzi kwiinkundla zentlalo. Ividiyo ibonisa ukuqhushumba okukhulu, isithi i-US Air Force yahlasela iindawo ezintathu zenyukliya e-Iran kwiveki ephelileyo  Fordow, Natanz, ne-Isfahan. Umsebenzisi we-Facebook wapapasha isithuba esithwa yi-Facebook kunye nomxholo olandelayo: Izolo ebusuku, emva kokuhlaselwa ngenqwelo-moya yase-US, indawo ebalulekileyo yase-Iran yokubeka i-Fordow..!! Indawo ebonakalayo (Inguqulelo yesiNgesi: Izolo ebusuku, emva kokuhlaselwa ngenqwelo-moya yase-US, indawo ebonakalayo kwiziko lenuclear lase-Iran, iFordow..!!) Ungayijonga le post apha.

claim: Owayesakuba nguMongameli waseRashiya uDmitry Medvedev wathi ngoJuni 2025 "amazwe aliqela akulungele ukunika iIran ngokuthe ngqo iintloko zawo zenyukliya".
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo NgoJuni 22, 2025, i-US yahlasela amaziko amathathu enyukliya e-Iran. Kwangaloo mini, izithuba kumawebhusayithi amaninzi eendaba ezentlalo  kuquka iReddit (ekhutshwe) neX (ekhutshwe)  zithi uMongameli waseRashiya wangaphambili uDmitry Medvedev wapapasha esidlangalaleni, "Amaninzi amazwe akulungele ukuhambisa ngokuthe ngqo i-Iran ngeenhloko zawo zenyukliya". Amanye amazwe amaninzi (ekhutshwe, agcinwe, agcinwe) afumana izigidi zeembono. Iingxelo eziphambili zithi abanye abasebenzisi bakholelwa ukuba eli tyala libubuxoki okanye ukuba eli tyala aliveli kwisithuba sikaMedvedev sokuqala. Nangona kukho amathandabuzo abazisebenzisi, uMedvedev  okhonza njengesihlalo weBhunga loKhuseleko laseRashiya  wathi esidlangalaleni (ekhutshwe) ukuba "amaninzi amazwe akulungele ukuhambisa ngokuthe ngqo i-Iran ngeenhloko zawo zenyukliya".

claim: Iimpapasho zabonisa ngokuqinisekileyo ileta eyabhalwa nguSitshutshisi-Jikelele wase-US uPam Bondi kuMlawuli we-FBI uKash Patel malunga neepstein files ngoFebruwari 2025.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo Emva kwencwadana kaJulayi 2025 evela kwiSebe lezoBulungisa lase-US (DOJ) nakwi-FBI ethi umenzi-bubi wesini ogwetyelweyo uJeffrey Epstein akazange agcine "uluhlu lwabathengi"  ngokuchasene nehempe ehlala ihleli  abanye abasebenzisi beendaba zentlalo babelane ngesikrini sencwadi ekuthiwa iyaphikisana nomphumo osemthethweni.Umtshutshisi-jikelele wase-US uPam Bondi wathumela ileta ekuthiwa yabhalwa ngoFebruwari 27, 2025, kuMlawuli we-FBI uKash Patel, ngokutsho kwezithuba zeendaba zentlalo.Kuleta, uBondi "wavuma ukufumana iifayile ezenziwe ngolwaphulo-mthetho ezithi ziqulathe" "uluhlu lwabafowunayo kunye noluhlu lwamagama amaxhoba", umsebenzisi we-Facebook owathi ileta ekuthiwa iyaphikisana.Abafundi be-Snopes Bondi basithumelele nge-imeyile baza baqinisekisa ukuba ileta kaPatel, eyafumaneka ngoFebruwari 27, 2025, yayikopelwe.Kule

claim: Umhlalutyi wolondolozo uCharlie Kirk wakha wathi ukuba wayenentombi eneminyaka elishumi ubudala ekhulelwe emva kokudlwengulwa, wayeya kufuna ukuba ibele umntwana.
evidence: Emva kokuba umphengululi wolondolozo uCharlie Kirk ebulawe ngoSeptemba 10, 2025, ngexesha lomsitho kwiYunivesithi yaseUtah Valley, abasebenzisi beendaba zentlalo babelana ngezithuba ezininzi eziqulethe izimvo zikaKirk. Enye yezithuba ezinjalo, ezabelwana ngazo kumaqonga amaninzi, yayikukuba uKirk wakha wathi ukuba wayenentombi eneminyaka eli-10 ubudala eyaba ngumntwana emva kokudlwengulwa, wayeza kufuna ukuba azale umntwana. Abafundi beSnopes bakhangela indawo befuna ulwazi oluthe kratya malunga nesi sithuba. Iposi eyabelwana ngaso iFeminist News (@feminist_news_now) safumanisa ukuba esi sithuba sinyanisile. Ivela kwividiyo yeYouTube ka-2024 epapashwe yiJubilee yeLebal enomxholo othi "Can 25e Students Omart 1 bit Conservative?"

claim: Inyaniso: I-WHO ayizange ivume unyango lwasekhaya lwe-COVID-19, musa ukuwela kwiingcamango ezingeyonyani.
evidence: Nangona singathanda ukukholelwa ukuba into enje ichanile, ukuza kuthi ga ngoku, akukho chiza okanye unyango, ngakumbi unyango lwasekhaya, lufunyenwe lusebenza ekutshabalaliseni intsholongwane. Akazange avunywe yi-WHO okanye nawuphi na umbutho wezempilo. Ibinzana lithetha ngesingxube esenziwe ngezinto ezilula zasekhitshini ezinje ngekhukhwini, intsimbi nobusi, xa zithathwa iintsuku ezintlanu ezinokutshabalalisa ukusasazeka kwentsholongwane.

claim: Urhulumente waseIndiya unikezela ngemali kwiintsapho ezifelweyo ze-COVID-19 - Iinzuzo zentsimi ye-inshorensi yokufa kwe-COVID-19 zinokufunyaniswa phantsi kweenkqubo ze-PMJJBY ne-PMSBY.
evidence: Umyalezo wabelwana ngawo ngokubanzi kumajelo asekuhlaleni, esithi izibonelelo ezifumaneka kwi-Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) kunye ne-Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) zinokufunyaniswa kwizigulo ezihlobene ne-COVID-19.

claim: NgoNovemba 2025, idolophu yaseMontana eyavota ngoMongameli wase-US uDonald Trump yaqhuba "umlilo we-pedophile" wokutshisa iimveliso ze-MAGA.
evidence: Njengoko iNdlu yeeNkulumbuso yase-US yayilungiselela ukuvota ukuze ikhuphe iifayile ezinxulumene nomenzi-bubi wesini ogwetyelweyo uJeffrey Epstein ngoNovemba 2025, kwavela ingxelo ehlaziyiweyo kwi-intanethi yokuba idolophu yaseMontana eyavotela uMongameli uDonald Trump ngesininzi yayibambe "umlilo we-pedophile" wokutshisa iiflegi zikaTrump kunye neethi ethi "Yenza iMelika ibe Mkhulu kwakhona", isigqubuthelo esaqala intshukumo ye-MAGA.

claim: Ekuqaleni kukaSeptemba 2025, iSekela-Mongameli wase-US uJD Vance wathi uSuku loLuntu kufuneka lube ngumbhiyozo "wamabhinqa adlula ekuzaleni".
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo Ekuqaleni kukaSeptemba 2025, kwapapashwa kwii-social media ukuba i-US Vice President uJD Vance wathi uSuku loLuntu kufuneka lube ngumthendeleko "womfazi owenza umsebenzi". Enye iposi (ezigcinwe) kwiiThreads yasasaza ingxubusho ngomfanekiso othi: WASHINGTON-JD Vance wabangela impikiswano ngoMvulo ngokuthi uSuku loLuntu lube ngumthendeleko "womfazi owenza umsebenzi". "Iqela labavukiweyo liye laphanzisa intsingiselo yokwenene yoSuku loLuntu", utshilo uVance kuFox News "Ukuhlonela abasebenzi kusenokonwabela abantu abasebenza ukuze baphile, kodwa akuvuyisi mna noDonald Trump".

claim: Ulawulo lukaTrump luthi umbhali wengoma uBillie Eilish Utshabalalisa Ilizwe Lethu Kwiingxelo Ezivuzayo
evidence: Ibali leWashington Post lathi ulawulo lukaTrump lumangalele uBillie Eilish ngokutshatyalaliswa kwelizwe lethu   emva koko lwabaleka njengomlilo phakathi kwamashishini emidlalo.Inqaku ngoLwesine  ngokuyinxalenye malunga namakhulu abantu abadumileyo abahlolisiswayo kwiphulo lokubhengeza i-coronavirus kulawulo lukaTrump  laliquka isicatshulwa esingalunganga esivela kwiNdlu yaseMhlophe ngo-Eilish.  UDonald Trump uyalitshabalalisa ilizwe lethu nayo yonke into esiyikhathaleleyo, lo mculi ophumelele iGrammy wathi kwiDemocratic National Convention ngoAgasti. Icaphula amaxwebhu afunyenwe ngabasebenzi beNdlu yeeDemocrats, iWashington Post yabhala ngokungalunganga ukuba amagosa kaTrump achaze u-Eilish njenge  hayi umxhasi kaTrump, yena  utshabalalisa ilizwe lethu kunye nayo yonke into esiyikhathaleleyo.

claim: Ngo-2013, usomashishini ngelo xesha nomqhubi weTV uDonald Trump wathi: "Ukuvalwa korhulumente kubangelwa kukungabikho kobuchule bukaMongameli. Ndiyathetha ukuba iingxaki ziqala phezulu kwaye kufuneka zisonjululwe phezulu.Ukuvalwa kuthetha ukuba umongameli ubuthathaka".
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo, uTrump wakha wathetha la mazwi achanileyo kumhlathi wesibini wale ngcaphuno. Akukho ngxelo yokuba uTrump wathetha la mazwi achanileyo kumhlathi wokuqala okanye wesithathu. Noko ke, amanye amazwi akhe ngelo xesha ayevumelana neengcinga ezifanayo. Ngethuba lokuvalwa kukaRhulumente wase-US okwaqala ngo-Okthobha 1, 2025, kwavela ingxelo kwi-intanethi ethi, ngo-2013, usomashishini ngelo xesha nomqhubi weTV uDonald Trump wathi: "Ukuvalwa kukaRhulumente kuwela ekungabikho kobuholi bukaMongameli. Ndiyathetha, iingxaki ziqala phezulu kwaye kufuneka zisonjululwe phezulu. Ukuvalwa kuthetha ukuba umongameli ubuthathaka". Ngokutsho kweemememes kunye neempapasho ezibonisa ingcaphuno, uTrump  owavuma ngexesha lokuvalwa kukaRhulumente ngo-2025  wakhupha le ngxelo iintsuku ngaphambi kokuvalwa kukaRhulumente ngexesha lokuvalwa kukaMongameli u-Barack Obama okwesibini ngo-2013.

claim: Unokufaka i-SMS kwi-RBG kwi-50409 ukuze usayine isicelo sokuxelela usepha wakho ukuba angahambi endaweni kaRuth Bader Ginsberg kwiNkundla Ephakamileyo de kube emva konyulo luka-2020
evidence: Thumela igama elithi resist kwi-Resistbot kwi-Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, okanye nge-text kwi-50409 uze uphendule imibuzo ethunyelweyo. Kwimizuzu embalwa, uya kuba unxibelelane neCongress okanye abanye abasemagunyeni bakho abakhethiweyo. Yenza ileta yakho ivuleke ukuze ufumane impembelelo ephezulu. Imiyalezo kunye namanani edatha anokusebenza ukuba usebenzisa i-SMS. Ukuphindaphinda komyalezo kuyahluka. Ukuyeka komyalezo kwi-50409 ukumisa yonke imiyalezo. Uncedo lomyalezo kwi-50409 ukuze ufumane uncedo. Bona imigaqo yethu yokusetyenziswa, isaziso sobumfihlo, kunye nomthetho wamalungelo omsebenzisi.

claim: NgoSeptemba 2025, izithuba zeendaba zentlalo zabonisa ngokuqinisekileyo inqaku elisuka kummeli uAlan Dershowitz ebhekisela kwiVanity Fair coverage kwi-albhamu ye-50th-birthday kaJeffrey Epstein.
evidence: NgoSeptemba 2025, abantu kwii-social media babelana ngenqaku elavela kummeli uAlan Dershowitz ekuthiwa lalikwi-albhamu yeemiyalezo yomntu ohlazo u-Jeffrey Epstein ngomhla wokuzalwa kwakhe kweminyaka engama-50 ngo-2003.U-Epstein, ekuthiwa wayenobudlelwane nabantu abaninzi abaphambili, wabulala ubomi bakhe entolongweni ngo-2019 ngoxa wayelinde ityala lokuthengisa ngesondo.Kwi-8 kaSeptemba, i-U.S. House Oversight Committee yabiza i-albhamu yomhla wokuzalwa emva kokubethela uDersstein kwiincwadi ezahlukeneyo ezinxulumene nomenzi wobubi ngokwesondo.U-Dersho wathi abasebenzisi beendaba zentlalo ababhekiselele ku-Epstein babethunyelwe kwi-coverage kaHarvard Fairstein eVancouver.UVancouver Law, wathi uDershowitz wakhonza njengengcali kwiqela lomongameli we-Weinstein, kwaye wakhonza njengomcebisi we-Advocacy, wakha wathumela inqaku kwi-intanethi.

claim: Inqwelomoya ye-Air India i-AI 315 yatshiswa xa ifika eDelhi, abakhweli bakhuselekile.
evidence: I-Vishvas News, kuphando lwayo, yafumanisa ukuba ifoto ehlaziyiweyo ayingowomva nje, kodwa isuka kwinto yangaphambili. Lo mfanekiso ubonisa umlilo owaqhambuka kwi-injini yenqwelo-moya ye-Air India Express eya eKochi kwisikhululo seenqwelomoya saseMuscat. Noko ke, ngoku iyahambelana ngokuxoka njengento eyenzeka kutshanje kwinqwelomoya ye-Air India kwisikhululo seenqwelomoya saseDelhi. eNew Delhi (Vishvas News). Kwaqhambuka umlilo kwiyunithi yamandla eluncedo yenqwelo-moya ye-Air India kwisikhululo seenqwelomoya saseDelhi. Ingozi yenzeka ngexesha lokufika kwenqwelo-moya. Bonke abakhweli kunye namalungu eqela likhuselekile. Ngoku, ngokunxulumene noku, ifoto iyahambelana kwi-intanethi zentlalo ebonisa umsi ophuma kwicandelo elingaphambili lenqwelo-moya. Abanye abantu banokubonwa bemi kufutshane. Abasebenzisi bathi lo mfanekiso mtsha kwaye ubonisa umlilo kwinqwelwana endala ye-AI-315 eseDelhi.

claim: UNancy Pelosi uthi iChina ingamthanda uJoe Biden.
evidence: I-Intel: I-Russia isebenza ukoyisa uBiden; i-China ne-Iran bakhetha ukubetha uTrump ngaphezu kwe-US I-Russia isebenza ngenkuthalo "ukudelela" umviwa we-Democratic presidential Joe Biden, ngelixa i-China ibona uMongameli uDonald Trump "engalindelekanga" kwaye ikhetha ukuba angaphumeleli kunyulo, ngokutsho kovavanyo olutsha lwe-US intelligence.Uhlalutyo, olupapashwe ngoLwesihlanu ngumphathi we-National Counter-Intelligence and Security Center, lukwagqiba kwelokuba i-Iran isebenza ukukhuthaza ukwahlukana nokugxotha uTrump ngaphambi konyulo luka-2020. claim: Kwisigaba seeyure ezintathu, ukususela ekupheleni kukaMeyi 11 ukuya ekuqaleni kukaMeyi 12, 2026, uMongameli wase-US uDonald Trump wathumela izihlandlo ezingama-55 kwiakhawunti yakhe yeTruth Social.

Ngoxa uTrump eyaziwa ngokuthumela izimvo ezicaphukisayo kule ndawo, abasebenzisi beendaba zentlalo bamangaliswa kukuphindaphinda kokuthunyelwa kwakhe okuqala ngo-10:14 pm EDT kwaye kwaqhubeka kuse ngoMeyi 12. URobert Reich, umgxeki kaTrump kunye nowayesakuba nguNobhala wezeMisebenzi phantsi koMongameli uBill Clinton, wabelane ngoluhlu olude lwezithuba zikaTrump ezithi ziiTruth Social, esithi uTrump ubhale iposti ezingama-55 ngeeyure ezintathu. Wongezelela: izithuba zakhe zaziquka ukubhekabheka okungenabuchule, iimbono zokungqinga ezingahambelaniyo malunga nokhetho luka-2020, kunye nokuthunyelwa kwezitha zakhe zokuba utshaba lwakhe loluntu lufuna ukukhuphela iikhowudi.

claim: Iiflegi zikazwelonke zasePakistan zaphakanyiswa kumsitho weDMK.
evidence: Umsebenzisi we-Facebook wapapasha iposi ehlaziyiweyo enesi siganeko: Ungajonga iposi apha. I-NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yaqinisekisa iposi ehlaziyiweyo yafumanisa ukuba ibingekho. Ukuhlolisisa umfanekiso, safumanisa ukuba iiflegi eziluhlaza ezibonwayo kwisakhelo aziveli ePakistan. Endaweni yoko, zimela i-Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), esebenzisa iflegi eluhlaza ene-crescent kunye nenkwenkwezi. Ngelixa iflegi ye-IUML ibonakala ifana kakhulu ngokumbono, iflegi ye-IUML yahlukile kwiflegi yasePakistan kuyilo kunye nokukhokela. Ukuqinisekiswa okuqhubekayo kwabonisa ukuba le mifanekiso ipapashwe ngamajelo eendaba ase-Front Kolkata emva kokutyunjwa kwakhe kwiphondo lase-Ndiya i-National Democratic Republic of India (DMK) ngoMatshi 30, 2026.

Omnye umsebenzisi we-X owabelana nge-clip (ezigciniwe) wabhala: "UKUTSHALWA - I-New York Mets ikhethe ukubonisa iflegi yePride endaweni yeFlegi yaseMelika ngexesha lomhobe wesizwe". claim: I-International Cricket Council (ICC) ikhuphe isaziso, ival' umda ibhodi ye-Pakistan cricket unyaka omnye.
evidence: I-International Cricket Council (ICC) ikhuphe isaziso, ival' umda ibhodi ye-Pakistan ye-cricket unyaka omnye. (Archive Link) "Isaziso" saqala ukuba yintsholongwane ngaphambi kweNdebe yeHlabathi ye-2026 T20, apho i-Pakistan inokuthatha inxaxheba kwiqela A lokungqubana ne-India kwiveki ezayo eColombo. Ngaphambili, iPakistan yayibhengeze ukuba ayizukuthatha indawo yomdlalo ophezulu kaFebruwari 15 nxamnye ne-India, nangona urhulumente wayecime ukuthatha inxaxheba kweqela lesizwe kwincam ye-bhola ekhatywayo eqala ngoFebruwari 7. Inyani Asifumananga zizo naziphi na iingxelo zeendaba ezithembekileyo ezichaza isigqibo se-ICC sokungqubana nePakistan unyaka. I-Newschecker yajonga iiakhawunti ezisemthethweni ze-Facebook, i-Instagram kunye ne-X handle ye-International Cricket Council (ICC) kwaye ayifumananga zibhengeze nayiphi na into kwi-Pakistan cricket.

Abafundi beSnopes bakhangela indawo yethu ngolwazi ngalo mbandela. I-reel yayineentloko ethi, "Iindaba eziPhambili: Isigaba esilandelayo? Izithintelo zokuhamba ngaphakathi kwe-US ngoku ziphantsi kwengxoxo yangaphakathi". I-reel yafumana ukubukwa okungaphezulu kwe-121,000. Abanye abasebenzisi, kwi-Facebook, bafumana ividiyo efanayo okanye i-ASA kunye ne-ASA

claim: Umlingisi uHelen Hunt wanika utitshala wakhe wobuntwana, "uNksz Eleanor", izipho ezizizigidi ezi-3 zeedola kwii-Oscar zakhe emva kokuba utitshala elahlekelwe ngumsebenzi wakhe ngenxa yokubonelela ngothisha ongakumbi ukuze ancede uHunt kwi-dyslexia yakhe.
evidence: NgoMatshi 2026, kwabakho ingxubusho ekwabelwana ngayo kwii-social media ethi umlingisi uHelen Hunt wanika utitshala wakhe we-Academy Award i-3 yezigidi zeedola kuba wayenike utitshala wobuntwana owanikela ngemfundo eyongezelelweyo ukunceda uHunt nge-dyslexia yakhe, ingxaki yokufunda ulwimi. Iingxubusho ezasazeka kwi-Facebook nakwiYouTube, kunye nabafundi abaninzi beSnopes bafikelela ekubuzeni ukuba inyanisile na. Enye ividiyo ye-Facebook yathi uHunt wanika utitshala owayesakuba ngutitshala ogama linguEleanor "i-Oscar bonus" yeedola ezizigidi zeedola ezingama-3, owayesithi wagxothwa ngo-1975 ngenxa yokunika uHunt "i-tutoring eyongezelelweyo" ngenxa ye-dyslexia yakhe. Ngokutsho kweposi, uEleanor wasebenza kwivenkile yokuthengisa iminyaka engama-23 ngaphambi kokuba uHunt anike ukuvula "iziko lokufunda nge-dyslexia elinceda abantwana abangama-2 000" ngaphambi kokufa kwakhe ngo-2019. Abanye abasebenzisi be-Facebook bathi uHunt

claim: Iimpapasho zentlalo ezosulelayo ezazisetyenziswa ngo-2024 zichaza ngokuchanekileyo uPaul McCartney ethenga iileta ezivela kumtshato wokuqala kaJohn Lennon aze azibuyisele kumfazi kaLennon owayengumfazi wakhe kunye nenqaku elimxelela ukuba angathengisi iinkumbulo zakhe.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo, uCynthia Lennon wathengisa iileta ezininzi zikaJohn Lennon emva kokuba isibini sahlukanisile ngo-1968, waza uPaul McCartney wathenga enye, wayilungisa waza wayivumela. Noko ke ... ... uMcCartney wabuyisela ileta enye kaJohn Lennon, kungekhona iileta ezininzi, waza wenza njalo iminyaka emininzi, kungekhona iintsuku ezimbalwa, emva kokuba iileta zithengisiwe. Akukho bungqina bokuba uMcCartney wayequka inqaku elixelela uCynthia Lennon ukuba angathengisi iinkumbulo zakhe. Kangangeminyaka, abasebenzisi be-intanethi babelana ngebali malunga nesenzo esifudumeleyo esenziwa ngumculi uPaul McCartney kumfazi wangaphambili weqabane lakhe leBhetles uJohn Lennon. Ngokutsho kweli bali, uCynthia Lennon, owayetshate noJohn ukususela ngo-1962 ukuya ku-1968 waza wafa ngo-2015, wathengisa iileta zothando zomyeni wakhe odumileyo ukuze afumane imali emva kokuqhawula umtshato. Ukufunda ngokuthengiswa, uMcCartney wathenga iileta waza wabuyela kuye. Imizekelo yebali livela kwizithuba ezahlukeneyo

claim: Abameli baseIndiana bazama ukugunyazisa umthetho owawuza kuvumela urhulumente ukuba abulale abantu ngokusebenzisa amagumbi egesi kunye namaqela okudubula.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo, abameli baseIndiana bazama ukuphumeza umthetho owawuza kuvumela urhulumente ukuba abulale abantu besebenzisa igesi ye-nitrogen okanye amaqela okudubula. Lo mthetho awuzange uphumelele. Ukuba wawusenziwa umthetho, kwakungekho sizathu sokuba urhulumente ayeza kwakha amagumbi okudubula. Amazwe asele esebenzisa igesi ye-nitrogen ukuze abulawe ayayilawula ngemaski, nangona kuthiwa iArizona iye yahlaziya igesi yayo yokubulala ukuze isetyenziswe kwixesha elizayo. Ekuqaleni kuka-2026, kwavela isimangalo kwi-intanethi sokuba abameli baseIndiana bazama ukuphumeza umthetho owawuya kuvumela ukubulawa kwabantu ngokusebenzisa amagesi kunye namaqela okudubula. Iindaba zasasazeka kumaqonga afana ne-Facebook, X, TikTok ne-Instagram. Abafundi beSnopes babhala bebuza ukuba i-Indiana yayisakha amagesi. Lo mbandela udinga ukuqinisekiswa.

evidence: UMphathiswa wayeneenyaniso ngobukhulu betyala laseKenya kodwa wacaphukisa ezinye zezibalo zakhe, kuquka xa ukubuyiswa kwezinto kwakudlula kwi-50% yemali engenayo. Izicwangciso ezisemthethweni zibeka iinjongo eziphantsi. Kwimvume yomongameli ngoMatshi 9, 2026, uMphathiswa wezezimali waseKenya uJohn Mbadi wavikela umthetho omtsha onempikiswano wokuxhasa ulwakhiwo ngaphandle kwetyala okanye irhafu entsha. UMthetho weNgcaciso-mveliso yeZiseko zeZiseko zeZiseko weZiseko zeZiseko zeZiseko uvelisa imodeli entsha. UMongameli uWilliam Ruto wathi umbawo wakhe wokuqala omkhulu

claim: INigeria yeyona nto ikhokelayo ekuveliseni i-cassava eAfrika nakwihlabathi.
evidence: INigeria yeyona mveliso inkulu ye-cassava ehlabathini, ibe iqulathe malunga nesinye kwisihlanu (21%) semveliso iyonke yehlabathi.Imfuno ye-cassava kunye nezinto zayo eziyinxalenye zikwurhwebo lwasekhaya lukhulu. Nangona kunjalo, imveliso ayikwazanga ukuhlangabezana nemfuno enkulu.Umzekelo, umsantsa wemfuno kunye nemveliso ye-Cassava Flour ekumgangatho ophezulu ufikelela kwi-485,000 yeetoni zemitha ngonyaka ngelixa umsantsa we-cassava starch ufikelela kwi-290,000 yeetoni.I-PwC iqikelela ukuba iNigeria iya kufuna malunga ne-28.3 yeetoni zemitha yeetoni ye-cassava esandisiweyo etyalwe minyaka le malunga ne-1.2 yezigidi zeehektare zomhlaba ukuze ihlangabezane nemfuno yelizwe ye-cassava by-products kunye ne-derivatives.

claim: Ngowe-2025, i-U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement yanika abasebenzi abatsha umvuzo we-100,000 yeedola ukongeza kwibhonasi yokusayina eyi-45,000 yeedola, ngaphezulu kakhulu koko kwenziwa ngootitshala baseUnited States.
evidence: NgoJulayi 2025, i-ICE yanika abasebenzi bayo bangaphambili ibhonasi yokubhalisa enezibalo ezintlanu kunye nomvuzo onokubakho we-100,000 yeedola ukubuyela kwi-arhente yokufudukela kwelinye ilizwe. Esi sibonelelo esivela kwi-arhente sidlula umyinge womvuzo wootitshala eUnited States. Ngakumbi, i-arhente yanika ukuya kuthi ga kwi-50,000 yeedola, hayi i-45,000 yeedola, njengebhonasi yokubhalisa, kwaye umvuzo we-ICE igosa kule ndawo wawususela kwi-88,621 yeedola ukuya kwi-144,031 yeedola ukusukela ngalo mbhalo. Ibhonasi epheleleyo enikezelweyo iyafumaneka kuphela kude kube ngu-Agasti 1, 2025, kwaye kuphela kubasebenzi bangaphambili. Iiholo zootitshala abanamava  njengokuthelekiso oluthe ngqo kwi-ICE ebuyela emsebenzini  yayimalunga ne-Ice enikezelwa abasebenzi bangaphambili be-arhente yokufudukela kwelinye ilizwe. ICE ayibuyanga imibuzo ngoko nangoko malunga nokuba ngaba igosa elitsha liza kufumana i-bonasi kunye ne- $45,000 yebhonasi, kwaye ngaba

claim: "UKasongo weza waza wayilahla loo nkqubo waza wazisa into ebizwa ngokuba yi-SHA ne-SHIF ngeendleko ze-KSh104 yezigidigidi".
evidence: UGachagua wathi urhulumente ubophelelekile ukuba abeke ii-KSh900 ezigidi (i-6.93 yezigidigidi zeedola) kwiikontraka kunye nabathengisi abahluphekileyo, kodwa idatha yamva nje karhulumente ibeka oku kwi-KSh684 yezigidigidi, nangona ingakumbi, umthwalo omncinci. Kodwa irekhodi ikwabonisa ukuba kwakunguKibaki, kungekhona umlandeli wakhe u-Uhuru Gachagua, owazisa isikolo samabanga aphakamileyo samabanga aphakamileyo. Ukubanga kwakhe ukuba utshintsho kwi-inshurensi yezempilo lwalumele luxabise i-KSh800 yezigidigidi kuphela akuchanekanga njengoko idatha ekhoyo ibonisa iindleko eziphezulu, kubandakanya i-KSh700 yezigidigidi zokuphucula inkqubo. Kodwa uGachagua wayechanekile ukuba isicwangciso esitsha sikaRuto se-inshurensi yezempilo kulindeleke ukuba sixabise abatyhili beerhafu ubuncinane i-KSh104 yezigidigidi.

claim: NgoDisemba 2025, iSebe lezoBulungisa laseMerika lakhupha ingxelo ye-FBI apho ummangali wathi uMongameli uDonald Trump wabona umalume wakhe ebulala umntwana wakhe osandul' ukuzalwa aze alilahle eli sebe eLake Michigan xa wayeneminyaka eli-13 ubudala, kwaye etshutshiswa ngesondo nguJeffrey Epstein.
evidence: Nangona eli phepha liyinyaniso, amabango alo awakaziqinisekisanga.Emva kokuba iSebe lezoBulungisa laseMerika likhuphe amafayile amaninzi anxulumene nomenzi-bubi wesini ongasekhoyo uJeffrey Epstein ngoDisemba 2025, kwavela ibango kumaqonga amaninzi eendaba ezentlalo (ekhutshwe, egcinwe, egcinwe, egcinwe) lokuba umntu owathi watshutshiswa ngesondo nguEpstein wafaka ingcebiso kwi-FBI yokuba uMongameli wase-US uDonald Trump wabona umalume wakhe ebulala umntwana wakhe osandul' ukuzalwa waza walahla umzimba wakhe eLake Michigan ngo-1984, xa wayeneminyaka eli-13.Abafundi bakaSnopes nabo basithumelele i-imeyile baza bakhangela indawo yethu ngolwazi malunga neli gunya.Ixwebhu le-imeyile liyinyaniso; ummangali, owaba nesazisi, ohlengahlengiso igama lakhe kwi-FBI, wafaka ingcebiso kwiZiko leZenzo zeZizwe ngo-Agasti 3, 2020, ngelixa uTrump wayeqhuba ngokuchasene noJoe Biden, owayesakuba ngumongameli, okwesihlandlo sesibini.

claim: Umfanekiso kaGandhi watshatyalaliswa eThiruvananthapuram emva kokuba iBJP ifumene igunya kwiqumrhu lesixeko
evidence: Ividiyo ebonisa indoda ehlasela umfanekiso kaMohammed Gandhi ofakelwe kwisiqithi seenqwelo-moya isasazwa ngokubanzi kwii-social media. Le vidiyo kuthiwa ibubungqina bokuba umfanekiso kaGandhi watshatyalaliswa eThirvananthapuram emva kokuba iBJP ifumene igunya kwiqumrhu lesixeko. Umsebenzisi we-Facebook wapapasha isithuba esithwa yi-viral ngelithi: "Ulawulo lweThirvananthapuram Corporation lunikwe i-BJP yiCongress, kwaye amaqela aqalisa ukubonisa ubuntu obuhlukileyo be-BJP.

claim: Ubuxoki: Umcebisi kaZelensky uChrystia Freeland Ungumnombo woMdibanisi wamaNazi
evidence: Umkhulu kaChrystia Freeland, uMykhailo Khomiak, wayekhonza njengomhleli wephephandaba lesiUkraine iKrakivski Visti ngexesha lokulawula kweJamani.Noko ke, wayengumlobi weendaba wasekuhlaleni osebenza phantsi kolawulo olunzima lwamaNazi, kwaye akukho bungqina bokuba wayengumgwebi wemfazwe okanye ebandakanyeke kwizenzo zoqeqesho.Amazwe eendaba anxulumene neKremlin axele ukuba uMongameli waseUkraine uVolodymyr Zelensky wammisela uChrystia Freeland njengomcebisi kuphuhliso lwezoqoqosho, emchaza njengoumzukulwana womnye wamaNazi. Lo mbandela wavakaliswa ngumthunywa weSebe lezeMpuma laseRashiya uMaria Zakharova, owathi uFreeland yintombi kaMykhailo Khomiak, esithi wasebenzisana namaNazi ngelixa ehleli iphephandaba iKrakov Krystia Vistiki kwaye kamva eVienna ngexesha lolawulo lwaseJamani.Ukunqulwa kweeNkundla zoLuntu ngo-2017 kwakusenziwa emva kokuba uFranksia Freeland,

claim: Ekupheleni kuka-2025, iSebe lezeMfundo lathi aliyi kuphinda lihlolisise ezi ziqinisekiso njengeziqinisekiso zobungcali: imfundo (kuquka iziqinisekiso zokufundisa), ukongama (MSN, DNP), umsebenzi wezentlalo (MSW, DSW), impilo yoluntu (MPH, DrPH), ugqirha ongumncedisi, unyango lomsebenzi, unyango lomzimba, i-audiology, i-speech-language pathology kunye neengcali zengcebiso kunye nonyango.
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo, iSebe lezeMfundo licebise ukuba likhuphe iinkqubo ezininzi zekholeji kwinkcazo "yezidanga zobungcali" ngokukodwa ngokunxulumene nokufaneleka kwemali mboleko yabafundi. Ukubhala oku, esi sicelo asikafiki. Ezinye izidanga zoqeqesho ziya kuthi zenziwe "izidanga zobungcali" phantsi kwecebo leSebe lezeMfundo. Akucaci ukuba esi sigqibo esiya kuchaphazela ngokukodwa imida yokuboleka kwemali mboleko yabafundi sibonisa utshintsho olubanzi kwimithetho nemikhwa yeSebe lezeMfundo. Ekupheleni kukaNovemba 2025, kwavela ingxelo ethi iSebe lezeMfundo liye lahlengahlengisa iinkqubo zobungcali nezinye izidanga zekholeji ukuze lizilahle kwinkcazo "yezidanga lobungcali".

claim: NgoMatshi 2026, uGeneral Michel Yakovleff waseFransi, owayekhonza kwizikhundla eziphambili kwiNATO, wathi ukuba iFransi incede iUnited States ikhusele uMlambo iHormuz kuya kufana "nokuthenga amatikiti asezantsi e-Titanic".
evidence: Malunga nale ngxelo Kwiiveki ezimbini emva kokuqala kwemfazwe yase-US e-Iran, kwaqala ukusasazeka ingxelo yokuba i-General yaseFransi uMichel Yakovleff, owayekhonza kwizikhundla eziphezulu zokukhokela kwi-NATO, wathi ukuba iFrance incede i-US ikhusele i-Strait of Hormuz ngokuchasene nokuhlaselwa yi-Iran, kuya kufana "nokuthenga amatikiti aphantsi kwexabiso kwi-Titanic," inqanawa yokhenketho enqabileyo eyabetha i-iceberg yaza yanikezela kuhambo lwayo lokuqala ukusuka eNgilani ukuya eNew York City ngo-1912.

claim: "Uganda inemihlangano, malunga ne-1.2 yezigidi zabakhenkethi abangena".
evidence: UBobi Wine wayechanekile malunga namanani okuzalwa ngonyaka ka-Uganda, nangona wayigqithisela kakhulu isabelo sebhange lesizwe esichithwe ekulungiseleleni amatyala.Izibakala zikaNathan Nandala Mafabi malunga nenani lokuqedwa kwesikolo samabanga aphantsi kunye namanani okungaphangeli kwabantu abaselula azange zisekwe bubungqina..Ngokuphambene, uGregory Mugisha Muntu wayechanekile xa wathi ama-70% abantu base-Uganda axhomekeke kuluntu lwezolimo, kodwa watshitshisa ukufika kwabakhenkethi ukuze agqithise umsantsa kunye nabamelwane bakhe base-Afrika kunye neTanzania.UFrank Bulira Kabinga waseKenya wenza amabango aliqela angalunganga malunga ne-United Emirates, kuquka umvuzo wabasebenzi abafudukayo basePhilippines.UJoseph Elton Mabirizi watshitshisa ubungakanani bamandla wamapolisa kunye nomkhosi wase-Uganda.Nge-30 kaNovemba 2025, abahlanu kwabalinganiswa abasibhozo kumongameli kwi-Uganda 2026 ukhetho jikelele bathatha inxaxheba kwingxoxo ethelekiswayo, bethatha inxaxheba

claim: UGeorge Stephanopoulos, umqhubi we-ABCs "Le Veki", wayeka udliwano-ndlebe neSekela Mongameli wase-US uJD Vance emva kokuba uVance egwenxa umbuzo malunga nomgcini-mda uTom Homan.
evidence: Ngeli nqaku kwakungacaci ukuba kutheni uStephanopoulos ekhethe ukuyeka udliwano-ndlebe noVance xa wenza njalo.Umamkeli-ndaba waphetha udliwano-ndlebe lwakhe olulandelayo, kunye noRhulumente wase-Illinois oMdemocratic uJB Pritzker, ngendlela efanayo.Nge-12 ka-Okthobha ka-2025, ukubonakala kuka-US Vice President JD Vance kwi-ABC's "This Week" kwaphela ngesiquphe ngexesha lengxoxo malunga nomgcini-mda wase-White House uTom Homan, owathi wavuma irhafu ye-50,000 yeedola ukunceda amagosa angaphantsi "akuwina imvumelwano karhulumente kulawulo lwesibini lukaTrump", ngokutsho kwengxelo yeMSNBC epapashwe ngoSeptemba.Ngethuba lengxoxo, uVance waphinda wayibonisa imibuzo yomamkeli-ndaba uGeorge Stephanopoulos malunga nento awayeyiyazi ngoHoman kunye nerhafu echaziweyo ukuze athethe ngokubhukuqa urhulumente wase-US, uVance awayibeka ityala kwiDemocrats.Ngokrate

claim: Abasebenzi base-UK abangakwaziyo ukusebenza kwiindawo eziphezulu ze-3 baya kufumana indibaniselwano yeSicwangciso soXhaswa kweMisebenzi kunye neKhredithi yeHlabathi, nto leyo eya kuthetha ukuba bafumana i-80% yomvuzo wabo.
evidence: Ukuze enze isicelo, umqeshwa kufuneka asebenze ubuncinane i-33% yeeyure zakhe eziqhelekileyo ukuze umsebenzi wakhe ubonwe njenge-viable kwaye ngenxa yoko ufanelekile phantsi kwale nkqubo. urhulumente uya kuhlawula ngoko ke isinye kwisithathu seeyure ezingasebenzi (ukuya kuthi ga kumda), nomqeshi enikela ngesinye kwisithathu. isinye kwisithathu esiseleyo esingenakukhokhwa ngokufanelekileyo yingeniso yomqeshwa kule nkqubo. oku kuthetha ukuba umqeshwa ufumana i-77% yomvuzo wakhe oqhelekileyo apho inxaxheba kaRhulumente ingakhange ihliselwe umda. nceda uqaphele ukuba kusekho iinkcukacha ezithile eziza kukhutshwa yi-HMRC malunga nokuba yintoni normal pay, ngakumbi kwabo umvuzo wabo utshintshiwe ukususela ngoMatshi ukuya kwisivumelwano esitsha somvuzo nabaqeshi babo, kunye nezinye iinkcukacha ezicacileyo zendlela esiza kusebenza ngayo iSicwangciso soXhaselo lweZithuba.

claim: Umphathi omkhulu wokhuseleko weSebe loKhuseleko lwasekhaya lase-US ukususela ngoMatshi 2026 wabizwa ngokuba nguIwona B. Horyn.
evidence: Ngasekupheleni kukaFebruwari 2026, abafundi beSnopes bafikelela baza bakhangela kwiwebhusayithi ngolwazi malunga nomntu oqanjwa ngokuba nguIwona B. Horyn, owathi abanye bathi wayengumgcini-mthetho oyintloko weSebe loKhuseleko lwasekhaya laseMerika.Ibhongo, elalisasazeka kwi-intanethi ukususela ekupheleni kukaNovemba 2025, lafumana ukuvuseleleka emva kokuba uHoryn oqanjwayo eboniswe kwinxalenye ye-comedy show yasebusuku "Jimmy Kimmel Live".

claim: I-Edo State eNigeria inenqanaba lokungaphangeli eli-19%.
evidence: Inani labantu abangasebenziyo kwilizwe lase-Edo liye lehla ukusuka kuma-25,1 ekhulwini kwikota yesithathu ka-2018 laya kuma-19 ekhulwini kwikota yesibini ka-2020, njengoko kubonisiwe kwidatha entsha ekhutshwe yi-Nigeria Bureau of Statistics (NBS).Ukuhla kwe-6.1 ekhulwini kubangelwa kukudala kwemisebenzi kulawulo lukaRhuluneli Godwin Obaseki, ekuthiwa i-Edo State Skills Development Agency (EdoJobs) yenze imisebenzi engaphezu kwama-170,000 ngeenkqubo ezintsha kule minyaka mithathu inesiqingatha idlulileyo.Ngokutsho kwengxelo ye-NBS, i-Edo State inelona nani liphantsi lokungaqeshwa kummandla waseMzantsi-ntshona, iphucula amanye amazwe amahlanu atyebileyo kwioli kule mmandla. Inani labantu abangasebenziyo phakathi kwamazwe aseMzantsi-ntshona lilandelayo: Akwa-I 45.2%; Baybom 27.8%; 31.6%; 40.3%, Rivers Delta State kunye ne-Edo Cross State ingxelo 43.7%,

claim: Abazali bomfazi wokuqala uMelania Trump beza eUnited States ngenxa yokukhuselwa yintsapho, ekwabizwa ngokuba kukufuduka kwe-chain.
evidence: Ukususela kulawulo lokuqala lukaMongameli Donald Trump, abaninzi baye baqiqa ngeemeko zokufudukela kwelinye ilizwe zabazali bomfazi wokuqala uMelania Trump nendlela abafika ngayo eUnited States. Amanye amanqaku aku-intanethi athi afika ngendlela eyahlekiswa nguTrump ngokwakhe yaza yazama ukuyithintela. Ividiyo yeYouTube kaJulayi 2025 yathi: UDonald Trump wakha intshukumo ngobundlobongela bokufudukela kwelinye ilizwe  iigosa, ukufuduswa, kunye nokugqogqa. Kodwa emva kwesigxina, wasebenzisa "ukuhamba ngothotho" awayeyidemonise ukuze angenise intsapho yakhe yokugweba ngelixa abantwana abantlakazi babethwaqunywe kubazali babo baza bavalelwa kwiigosa. Ngethuba lolawulo lwakhe lokuqala, uTrump eneneni wazama ukulawula isoyikiso "sokufudukela kwelinye ilizwe", eyibiza ngokuba yimigudu yokhuseleko lwesizwe.

claim: Ngexesha likaRhuluneli Hochuls, kuye kwabakho ulwaphulo-mthetho olungakumbi kwizitrato zethu.
evidence: I-Republican ehamba phambili yathi irekhodi likaRhuluneli uKathy Hochul "ilibi" emva kotyelelo lwakhe kutshanje njengorhuluneli eNtshona New York. "Eyona nto kuphela abantu baseNew York ekufuneka bayibonise ngexesha lakhe lokulawula ngamaxabiso anyukayo, inkcitho engekho mthethweni, iindleko zeMedicaid ezikhuphukayo ngenxa yobuxoki nokuxhaphaza, kunye nolwaphulo-mthetho oluninzi kwizitrato zethu", utshilo uMongameli weSenate Minority Leader uRobert Ortt, R-North Tonawanda.Ukwanda kolwaphulo-mthetho ngexesha lobhubhane kwabhalwa kakuhle, kodwa sazibuza ukuba ngaba i-Ortt's ibango elithi "olwaphulo-mthetho oluninzi kwizitrato zethu" lichanekile na ukususela ekubeni uHochul waba ngumlawuli ngoAgasti 24, 2021.

claim: U-Amit Shah wathi abantu abachaphazelekayo kumajelo asekuhlaleni abavela kuwo onke amaqela baphila ngesondlo sabo se-5kg.
evidence: Ikhadi leendaba le-NDTV, ekucingelwa ukuba licaphula uNdunankulu wezangaphakathi uAmit Shah, liyasasazeka kwii-social media. Ithi u-Shah uthe, "Bonke abasebenzi kwi-social media, nokuba ngabeliphi iqela, basinda kwi-5kg yesondlo sethu!" Lo mfanekiso wabelwana ngawo ngokubanzi ngaphambi kweNyulo yoWiso-mthetho yaseBihar 2025, kunye nabasebenzisi abagxeka le ngxelo.
